common.footer: Payroll Copilot — Clear payslip checks for employees and employers.

landing.title: Ask payroll questions or check your payslip.
landing.lead: Get clear answers about your pay, and a simple checklist after you upload a payslip.
landing.validateCtaHint: Upload a payslip and get a clear checklist of what looks fine and what needs attention.

assistant.title: Payroll Assistant
assistant.intro: Ask about your payslip, overtime, leave, taxes, and what documents help confirm your pay.
assistant.empty: Start with a suggested question, or type your own.
assistant.unavailable: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
assistant.guardrailBlocked: I can only help with payroll and payslip-related questions.
assistant.guardrailLimited: Here’s general guidance based on what I can confirm right now.
assistant.noSource: I shared general guidance because an exact matching reference wasn’t available.
assistant.followUp1: What supporting documents should I upload?
assistant.followUp2: Can you explain overtime on a payslip?
assistant.followUp3: What does a payslip warning usually mean?
assistant.suggested1: What documents are needed to validate a payslip?
assistant.suggested2: How should overtime be reflected on a payslip?
assistant.suggested3: What is the difference between a validation warning and a critical issue?

validate.title: Validate My Payslip
validate.intro: Upload your payslip and optional supporting documents. We’ll walk you through a clear checklist.
validate.validating: Uploading your files and preparing the checklist…
validate.validatingChecklistHint: We're checking your reviewed payslip details against payroll rules.
validate.preparingHint: We're reading your payslip and preparing the details for review.
validate.preparingDetails: This may take a moment for larger files.
validate.documentLanguageHint: Choose the language that best matches your payslip text.
validate.dragHint: PDF, JPG, or PNG — up to 50MB
validate.payslipRequired: Please upload a payslip to continue.
validate.validationFailed: We couldn’t finish the checklist. Please try again.
validate.extractionFailed: We couldn’t read your payslip. Please try again.
validate.extractionOcrFailed: We couldn’t read the text from your document. Please try a clearer PDF or image.
validate.extractionParserFailed: We read your document, but some details could not be understood. Please try again.
validate.reviewLead: Review and edit the details read from your payslip before we run the checklist.
validate.reviewManualCheck: You can correct any field before continuing. Edits are saved as a new review version.
validate.reviewPartialNotice: We could only read some details from your document. Edit what you can, then continue.
validate.fieldUnableToRead: We could not read this field

slots.payslipWhy: Used to check salary, deductions, overtime, and line items.
slots.attendanceWhy: Helps confirm hours, overtime, and leave when that check is available.
slots.contractWhy: Helps compare pay against agreements when that check is available.
slots.nationalIdWhy: Helps identity and benefit checks when those checks are available.

uploadErrors.duplicate: This file has already been selected.
uploadErrors.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type for this slot ({{type}}).
uploadErrors.invalidPdf: This PDF looks invalid or corrupted.
uploadErrors.injection: This file contains unsupported instruction-like content.

report.noIssues: No issues were found in the completed checks.
report.explainNote: Plain-language explanation based on the checklist item.
report.explainFailed: An explanation could not be prepared for this item.
report.confidenceUnavailable: Confidence not available for this item
report.recCritical: Review this with your payroll administrator before approving payment.
report.recWarning: Double-check this payslip detail and any supporting records.
report.recInfo: Keep supporting records on file for completeness.
